info.title: Stealth Mail API
info.description: Development API for mailbox policy, Stellar postage proofs, and delivery receipts.

StellarSignedRequest.description: Authenticates a Stellar account through the [SEP-10 Web Authentication](https://github.com/stellar/stellar-protocol/blob/master/ecosystem/sep-0010.md) challenge flow. Fetch a short-lived challenge transaction from the service's WEB_AUTH_ENDPOINT, verify the server signature and transaction fields, sign the challenge with an authorized Stellar account signer, and exchange the signed transaction for a token. Send that token on protected API calls as `Authorization: Bearer <SEP-10-token>`. Never send a Stellar secret seed. The server derives the actor from the verified token and enforces challenge expiry and replay protection; `x-stealth-address` alone is not proof of identity.
x-challenge-flow: Request a challenge transaction from the WEB_AUTH_ENDPOINT for the Stellar account.
Validate the challenge according to SEP-10 before signing it.
Sign the challenge with an authorized account signer and return the signed transaction.
Use the returned short-lived token in the Authorization header for protected operations.

ActorHeader.name: x-stealth-address
ActorHeader.description: Development actor transport. Production must derive this identity from a verified signed session.

path.description: Safe request field path using dot and bracket notation; root errors use $.

rule.description: Application-owned validation rule code, independent of validator libraries.

message.description: Human-readable validation guidance. Rejected input values are never echoed.

owner.description: Stellar address of the recipient mailbox owner.

sender.description: Stellar address of the candidate sender.

verified.description: Whether the sender identity has been verified.

allowed.description: True if the sender is allowed to mail the recipient.

reasonCode.description: Stable reason code for the policy outcome.

message.description: Human-readable but non-authoritative explanation of the decision.

RetryClassification.description: Stable machine-readable classification of retry eligibility.

retryable.description: Indicates whether the request can be retried.

retryAfter.description: Optional delay in seconds before retrying the request.

ApiErrorRegistry.description: Stable error-code metadata. This schema is generated from the runtime registry.

bad_request.description: The request could not be parsed or is malformed.

conflict.message: The request conflicts with the current resource state

forbidden.message: The requested operation is not permitted
forbidden.description: The authenticated actor is not permitted to perform the operation.

internal_error.description: The server encountered an unexpected condition.

method_not_allowed.message: The method is not allowed for this resource
method_not_allowed.description: The resource does not support the requested HTTP method.

not_found.message: The requested resource was not found
not_found.description: The requested resource does not exist or is not visible to the actor.

unauthorized.description: Valid authentication credentials were not provided.

validation_error.description: One or more request fields failed validation.

too_many_requests.description: A request rate limit was exceeded.

dependency_unavailable.description: The server cannot handle the request because a required dependency is unavailable.

data_integrity_error.description: Stored data did not satisfy the server's integrity checks.

expired_challenge.description: The submitted authentication or quote challenge is no longer valid.

challenge_not_yet_valid.message: The challenge is not yet valid
challenge_not_yet_valid.description: The submitted authentication challenge is dated too far in the future.

idempotency_mismatch.message: The idempotency key was already used for a different request
idempotency_mismatch.description: An idempotency key was reused with a different request payload.

invalid_state_transition.message: The requested state transition is invalid
invalid_state_transition.description: The resource cannot transition from its current state as requested.

insufficient_postage.message: The postage amount is below the required minimum
insufficient_postage.description: The supplied postage does not meet the recipient mailbox minimum.

duplicate_receipt.message: A receipt already exists for this message
duplicate_receipt.description: A delivery receipt has already been recorded for the message.

duplicate_postage.message: Postage already exists for this message
duplicate_postage.description: A postage record has already been submitted for the message.

invalid_quote.description: The supplied postage quote failed integrity validation.

request_in_progress.message: An equivalent request is already in progress
request_in_progress.description: A matching operation currently holds the idempotency lease.

post.summary: Evaluate whether a sender can mail a recipient

requestBody.description: Mail admission policy evaluation input parameters.

malformedAddress.summary: Malformed request with invalid Stellar address

malformedPostage.summary: Malformed request with negative postage amount

data.message: Sender satisfies all recipient mailbox policies.
Sender is explicitly allowed by the recipient.
Sender is explicitly blocked by the recipient.

unknownSendersDisabled.summary: Policy Denied — Unknown senders disabled by recipient policy

data.message: Recipient does not accept mail from unknown senders.

insufficientPostage.summary: Policy Denied — Postage provided is below recipient minimum requirement

data.message: Provided postage is insufficient for this recipient.

verificationRequired.summary: Policy Denied — Sender identity verification is required

400.description: Bad Request — Invalid request JSON structure or missing Content-Type header

invalidJson.summary: Bad Request — Syntax error in JSON body

422.description: Unprocessable Entity — Request payload validation failure

invalidStellarAddress.summary: Validation failure — Malformed Stellar address field

invalidPostageAmount.summary: Validation failure — Malformed postage amount string
